I still have a greater pull towards stalker life. But now I'll know there's a "backup airfield". If I get tired of it - I'll definitely become a hunter. I met with the hunter, discussed their business. So, and? Says they don't deal with artifacts, because their channel doesn't want to be exposed in illegal activities. And nobody cares about monster guts... Hmm... Maybe I should get into that too. I'm getting a bit tired... getting old, apparently. Well? What do you want? I helped you, right? Now it's your turn... I can give you either a decent suit, and I'll throw in some little things, or cash - about... fifteen thousand. What do you want? Give me your gear. I'll take the money. Fair enough. Don't make a face. Stasik struts around in an outfit like this and he's fine. Money is always money. See you, benefactor. You were wandering around for a long time, my dear. We found out about the beast-catchers without you. And... what? What, what? Nothing... Alright, remember my generosity.
Sidorovich asked to find out about the hunters' sales channels. Advised to talk to Nazar, who is somewhere in the south of the Gut. Only gave a couple of days deadline, need to make it. Zub, I have a question. You know, Marked One, that my answers cost money. Yeah, that's clear. You wouldn't happen to know how one can protect against bloodsuckers? Some method, or something else? Have you encountered bloodsuckers? Well, you've probably been lucky so far? Those bastards produce something that makes a person's skin burst. Terrible stuff. But... there's a rumor that someone found a way to fight against this 'radiation'. Supposedly there is an artifact in the Zone that protects you very well. I have my suspicions about one of these 'experts'. Would you agree to pay him a visit and feel him out regarding this miracle artifact? I think it'll be useful for everyone. And where do I look for this 'expert'? Running around, searching... no, count me out. There's a guy at the Army Warehouses. His name is Pavlo Zubr. Go see him and have a chat. And if you find out anything interesting, then I, in turn, will try not to cheat you. What if something really... helps. I'll be at the warehouses, I'll ask this Zubr, maybe I'll find something out. Waiting for news. You asked, I answered. Suit yourself.
Pavlo, got some business. Ah, well? What wind blew ya in? A tailwind, of course. Come back down to earth, we need to talk. Ah, Marked One? I heard somethin' 'bout ya like that. Are you the one who squeezed Mole? 'Bout time somebody did - sneakin' around everywhere, botherin' everyone. Mole? Squeezed? No, everything's fine. Anyway, I have another question... So wait, didn't they whack him? Or... Weird, people were sayin' that... he croaked. Looks like they were bullshittin'. What's the question? Someone said you've been having good luck with bloodsuckers? That you know some secret on how to survive their roar? Maybe you'll tell me? Well, you should tell this 'somebody' that you won't even get a pimple for free, as they say. You wanna know my secret - pay up. Bucks from you. Two grand. Then we'll have a business talk. I'll lay it all out for ya, honestly - what, how much, what for, and I'll even throw somethin' on top. Two thousand? In checks? Don't have it on me, but... I'll think about it. You take checks? Here, hold these two grand. Checks'll do. Nobody's complained so far... Think 'bout it. When you have it, then we'll talk. I'm takin' it, of course... Listen here, what and how you gotta do, when a bloodsucker shows up on the horizon... Well, besides grabbin' your legs and runnin', obviously...\nSo here's the deal: there's this artifact - Balloon it's called. Findin' it is extremely hard, very rare. They say it's only been seen in the Rusty Forest, the one on the Radar. Somewhere in its western part... found it last time. Activate this art on your belt and walk around whistlin'... the bloodsucker's pipe barely touches you... You can, of course, boil one up yourself, the nerds are a smart bunch, found a recipe for it. Need three good arts, well and the mandible of that very bloodsucker. I ain't tested the recipe myself, comes out expensive. Plus I got this little art in reserve, don't need it right now. I'll share the recipe, you showed me respect. On the Radar?! Alright... or maybe I'll boil it myself, if it's needed. Ah! It's you, squeezer. Huntin' bloodsuckers? Or are they huntin' you? Yeah, them... What about you, haven't changed your mind about sharing your good fortune? Marked One, we already chopped it up - you give me two thousand greenbacks, and I tell you everything I know.
I found out about that secret artifact. Well, well. And what kind of miracle is it? You need a very rare art. Balloon it's called. Where to get it?.. He said it was found last time on the Radar, in the Rusty Forest. And that's it? There is, however, also a recipe for this 'antidote'. Now that's a different conversation. Otherwise - the Radar, who in their right mind would poke their head in there. Although... there are enough crazy people around, many will agree to buy this information. Could make a profit. Well and what will I get for this? This information cost me good money. Listen, don't run your mouth too much about what you learned and heard, okay? And here, take this... a little gift. You earned it. Earned it?! I gave up serious cash for this info. And you decided to get off with an art. That won't do. Marked One, don't make noise. You got an artifact as a reward, you kept the recipe, so be satisfied. By all rights, I should also collect a fee from you for the tip on this 'expert'. Therefore, consider us even. Run along. Find a stalker, and try to get the method of protection against bloodsuckers from him. Pavlo Zubr, at the Army Warehouses Maybe I need to find someone else? Listen here, Marked One, you ain't one of the former ones by chance? Can't tell from the mug, true, but you got that stench comin' off ya. Daddy Borov's got a nose for it. What do you care? In the Zone, like in the army, everyone starts with a clean slate. So, are there any 'missing in action'? If not, then I'll be going. Hold up. You're right, I don't give a shit what you had goin' on in the past. Main thing is that you can be useful right now. In short, here's the deal. Three clowns were hoofin' it to me from the Agroprom, one had some serious intel. I told 'em, shit, keep your heads down, you seals, take the back roads to me, so no one even catches a shadow... But no - got into a scrap with some stalker trash at the Garbage, only one made it out of that mess. Another one supposedly got nailed on the spot with a grenade, and the third seems like he got wounded, maybe ain't kicked the bucket yet. And here word got 'round that the Duty members pinched someone, someone from our guys.. If it's my courier, that's gonna be real bad - the Duty members got this one beast, Ivantsov is his last name - absolutely zero street smarts, a cop's mug... he'll crack anyone you want in a second.\nYou should go, rub shoulders there, cipher out what's what, who they pinched... Only the first guy you meet ain't gonna start waggin' his tongue there, I reckon... Roll up on one Duty member, there's a guy there - an acquaintance, likes to hit the bottle. Tip him off that you're from me. In short, find out - who they pinched and what they found on him, and if they found anything at all... A notebook, a note, a journal... a message, in short, somethin'... And if you bring it to me, you'll be a real beauty - I'll roll out a prize, everyone will be green with envy. And don't drag it out, the matter is urgent. These mix-ups are already pissin' me off. Who am I supposed to ask? In the Bar of these Duty members, if I run into the wrong guy, they'll whack me. Borov, I don't play these games. They'll whack me for asking questions like that. There's one guy there, Barin - that's his handle. Go chop it up with him. Well, then shoo out of here. And forget our conversation.
Still drinking the bitter stuff? Not what, but who... They say your guys recently took some bandit... Who is it, maybe they found something on him? Actually, I don't really need to know this... Borov is asking, do you know him? Borov, you say... You from him, or what? Keep your voice down, by the way... Listen here: they took some barely breathing guy recently, at the Garbage. He crawled away from the stalkers and ran into our guys. They had a shootout among themselves there, wounded him, and killed one, an acquaintance stalker told me this later. First our guys searched him, and then whacked him - he wasn't going to make it anyway. Well? Did they find anything on him? Or did you find something? You have to understand, Borov needs it, not me... He says, you have to pass it to me, if there was anything... I don't know what they found there, seems like nothing, or maybe the stalkers already gutted him before that, just didn't finish him off... You have to ask the stalkers, if you have such a 'big interest'. And who am I supposed to look for there, the Garbage is big. You bring five bottles of vodka. We'll wet our whistles, have a talk, otherwise drinking alone is... depressing. Depressing for him. Maybe someone will bring you a drink today. I'll pass for now. Hold your bottles, but I'm not drinking with you. Who do I ask at the Garbage? Squeamish? Well, well, watch out so it doesn't come back to bite you. A business talk! Otherwise it's immediately 'I'm from Borov'... As if I ever did anything for Borov for free. Ask Artyom Cook, his stalker trash clashed with the bandits there. And... Look... I don't know you, and you don't know me. Got it? You'd be better off... quitting. Ah! It's you again... Watch it, I'll whisper to the right people... Or are you here on business? I brought you vodka. Who do I look for at the Garbage? Don't get worked up. I'm just passing by. Hmm... Respect. Ask Artyom Cook. And... Look... I don't know you, and you don't know me. Got it?
I'm here on business, I have a question. Well? What do you want? You had a skirmish with bandits here recently. Seems like you even shot somebody... Was there anything interesting on him? They say you can sometimes find magazines on them. Well... those ones... you get it. I've already re-read everything in the Bar... Nah... Nothin', all sorts of trash: a couple of assault rifles - off the corpse and the half-dead guy - we didn't even bother finishing him off. And a few bullets... No magazines. Basically, if we hadn't found a couple bottles of booze on 'em, there wouldn't have been anything interesting at all. Well, also found a PDA on the corpse, two bullets hit it right on, in short - complete junk. Well, and... And what? A couple hundred buckshot and it's yours. We're a little low on supplies, and the monsters keep coming. You can see for yourself. For some reason I didn't even doubt it. Straight up a couple hundred?! Or maybe we can solve this differently? Differently, you say... Here's all sorts of monster meat for you. Trade it with Dan at the Cordon, it's not far. If it's not enough - you'll shoot some on the way. I myself, as you understand, cannot leave. I'm sort of in charge here, keeping an eye on things. I'll trade it, bring it back. Wait.
Where are that swindler's things? I brought the buckshot, we had a deal after all. As if I would ask otherwise. Here is everything, as agreed. Thanks, Marked One, attaboy. Here's his little PDA for you, and a small gift from me. Yeah... just a casing left of the PDA, you could say, and a bent and beaten one at that... Well, since there's nothing interesting, I'll go re-read old magazines in the Bar. I see you're returning to life, Marked One. Drawn to the 'weaker' sex.
I visited the Duty member and had to run around somewhere else too. A fool runs around like a... Did you find out anything? Here's the deal, that prisoner was barely breathing - the Duty members whacked him, why drag a half-dead guy around. Whacked him... That's good, though it's bad too. Well, what 'bout his gear? What gear, there was nothing - either he lost it while crawling, or destroyed it, or something else. Here, just a broken PDA... Yeah... This ain't a PDA, you can't even tell whose it was now. Well then... there was nothin' - and that's good too. Means it wasn't him, or he managed to figure it out and got rid of it in time... Thanks for that anyway. Hold this little present. Yeah... This ain't a PDA, you can't even tell whose it was now. Well then... there was nothin' - and that's good too. Means it wasn't him, or he managed to figure it out and got rid of it in time... Thanks for that anyway. Hold this little present. Not bad, a decent gun. A worthy reward, thank you. Need to find out for Borov where his courier disappeared to and, if possible, find his belongings. Advised to chat with the Duty member Barin, in the Bar. Nimble is asking to bring a new merc suit, with a mask. As a reward promised to help boil a 'Stone Flower' artifact, completely covered in 'green'. I see you've settled into your new place. Oh, Marked One, speak of the devil, here's the deal... I heard that the mercs have a trader, what's his name... Vakhtang. He deals in rare property. You can't get that kind of stuff here. What I'm getting at... Ordinary stalkers can't approach the mercs, they'll shoot you and won't ask your name, but you, as they say, smoothed things over with them... somehow? The folks decided to move north, and they're taking me into their company, but I don't have decent armor. If you agree to bring me a brand new merc armor, with a mask, then I'll help you boil a good art, covered in 'green', you won't regret it. A 'Stone Flower', the one from the 'Carousel'. Literally covered in 'green'?! You don't believe me?! I'm speaking seriously. I've already gotten the hang of this business, only things are tight with the components, but that's for later. And besides: everything fair and square - comes out green, like an emerald. I don't have time right now, ask someone else. Alright, I'll be at the warehouses, I'll drop by Vakhtang. If no, then no. You'll regret it yourself later. So I'm, uh, waiting. Don't you forget.
Nimble, brought you the armor, you'll be a real 'beaut'. Marked One, respect. Now this is a thing, not like a bandit jacket. How are things regarding boiling the 'Stone Flower'? 'Stone Flower'?.. I'll boil it, of course... bring the ingredients... What?! I ran around, got the armor for him, and he - ingredients. Well... uh... I warned you right away that things were tight with that. I'll boil the artifact, don't doubt it. All I need is - a dog tail, a tushkano head, a "Thorn" and a "Jellyfish". Got dragged in again... Alright, hold your armor, I'll go gather them. But, if you suddenly need anything else, then you've only got yourself to blame. Think I'll keep the armor for myself. I like it too. We agreed on this right away, remember. You shouldn't have... You would've gotten a good artifact.
Prapor is asking to take an artifact to Sidorovich, boar hooves to Pakhom and dog tails to Ignat. As a reward promised to help boil a "Slug" artifact, completely covered in "green". Help boil a "Slug" according to your recipe, just so it's completely covered in "green". Look at that! And in "green" right away?! The one from the "Springboard"? Well for that you need to have experience. And that, just like sexual impotence, comes with time. Heh-heh. Experience - that's understandable. Do you have experience yourself? Maybe we can make a deal? Maybe... only, you understand yourself... you help me - I help you. What do you need this time? I've got some urgent business piled up here. Need to finish it. Take a couple or three packages over. I can't pull my guys away, you see yourself what's going on here, the monsters keep coming, every gun counts. And you - are a free bird. Well, so what about it? It's not far from here, to Sidorovich and to the Swamps, and to the Gut too. It's not far... for you, maybe I'll take them, only I didn't get it, what about the artifact? With the art? It's all simple. You bring me everything on the list, I'll boil this thing for you, since you're... all thumbs, it'll be completely green. But that's only after we sort out our business. On the list, then... Tell me, where and what to carry. So it's like this, listen carefully: \nSidorovich asked to bring him odd artifacts, if we come across any... Here... we found one of those. Just make it quick, he's been waiting a long time. \nKnow about the nerds in the Swamps? They're studying the little beasts intensely... We gathered some boar hooves here, the kind they're interested in. You'll take them quickly, before they rot. \nThe hunters in the Gut make all sorts of things from tails. Well, we gathered some choice ones for them. Also needs to be done quickly, so they don't go to waste. I might be a free bird, but I have enough of my own worries, I'll manage somehow. Your business, Marked One. And you could've had a good artifact. You sure talked a lot... Give me your tails and hooves with the artifact. Should write it down, so I don't forget who, where, and how much. Here, don't lose them. And I'll look out for the right anomaly in the meantime, here you also need to know which one and where to look.
Sidorovich, package for you from Prapor from the Garbage. What kind of bull... oddity did he send this time? Some artifact, first time I see one like this, take it. What are you standing there for? Hold a little medicine and get out of here, don't interfere with work. Already left, why so nervous...
Pakhom, package for you from Prapor from the Garbage. What kind of monster meat did he send this time? A sack of boar hooves. Hold some buckshot, for your troubles. Yeah, understood...
Ignat, package for you from Prapor from the Garbage. What kind of monster meat did he send this time? A sack of dog tails. Hold a couple of sausages, grab a bite. Don't seem to be hungry... The Warrant Officer asked to pass the memory cards to Sakharov. Preoccupied with something again? You're exactly who I need. Got a little job, for your fast legs. What, where and what's the reward? Wow, how fast everything is with you! Here's the deal: \nThe nerds who hang out at Yantar set up their devices here, and well, asked to send the results from them sometimes. Only needs to be done quickly, because data gets outdated by the day. If you're not heading that way, then I'll just send someone from my guys. I'm heading exactly there. What do I carry? Today definitely - not that way. Then hold the memory cards. Sakharov will reward you, don't doubt it.
Professor, I'm here to see you from the Warrant Officer from the Garbage. Yes, yes... He does us some favors. What do you have there? Memory cards from the devices, take them. Thank you, thank you... Did you want something else? Something else?! He promised that you would reward me, getting to you - is quite the trek. Ah, Marked One, you mean the reward? Of course, take it, I've been overworking. Not much...
